qualificationBoundary: This proves v12.25 browser terminal progress/deadlines, sequential archive access, backup cancel/retry, exact archive search, semantic freshness, hydration, summary, Markdown, PDF, and cleanup paths. It does not prove physical native recording/transcription, mobile suspension or memory-pressure behavior, or destination-app receipt.
